title: Communauté d'agglomération Grand Châtellerault
summary: Communauté d'agglomération Grand Châtellerault is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Châtellerault. It is located in the Vienne department, in the Nouvelle-Aquitaine region, western France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Châtellerault. Its area is 1133.9 km2. Its population was 83,615 in 2019, of which 31,487 in Châtellerault proper.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération Grand Châtellerault is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Châtellerault. It is located in the Vienne department, in the Nouvelle-Aquitaine region, western France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Châtellerault. Its area is 1133.9 km2. Its population was 83,615 in 2019, of which 31,487 in Châtellerault proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 47 communes:
